title: hymenophyllum molle
intro: Hymenophyllum molle, also known as the soft filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum molle include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Hymenophyllum molle can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
